name: Cat Dimension
short_description: Cat Dimension is an action-packed 2D side-scrolling platformer crafted in pixel art. Team up with Willy, a brave cat hero, to stop an alien animal invasion across a colorful retro-inspired world full of traps, enemies, and epic boss fights. Save the scientists!
detailed_description:
Cat Dimension — A 2D platformer about cats, made in pixel art.

Cat Dimension is an action-packed 2D side-scrolling platformer inspired by the golden era of retro gaming. Step into the paws of Willy, a small but fearless cat, and embark on a heroic adventure to save your world from a mysterious alien animal invasion.

📖 The Story

Something terrible has happened. Alien creatures have invaded the world and captured the scientists who were studying dimensional anomalies. Willy, a brave little cat with a heart of gold, is the only one who can stop them. Travel through a colorful and dangerous 2D world, face fierce enemies, and free every last scientist. No one else will do it — it’s all up to you!

🎮 Gameplay

Run, jump, and fight your way through over 30 handcrafted levels, each with its own unique theme, layout, and set of challenges. You’ll need quick reflexes, precise jumps, and smart thinking to navigate deadly spikes, bottomless pits, moving platforms, and cleverly placed traps.

Along the way, collect food and items scattered throughout the levels to restore your health and keep Willy going. Discover power-ups and skills that unlock as you progress, giving you new ways to overcome increasingly difficult obstacles.

Face off against more than 30 different enemy types, from mischievous critters to menacing alien beasts. And when you reach the end of each world, prepare for intense boss battles that will put all your skills to the test.

✨ Key Features

▸    Classic platforming action: Tight, responsive controls inspired by the best retro platformers. Every jump feels precise and satisfying.

▸    30+ unique levels: Each stage features a distinct theme, creative obstacles, and escalating difficulty that keeps you coming back for more.

▸    Vibrant pixel art: A colorful, hand-crafted 2D world bursting with personality, charm, and retro appeal.

▸    30+ enemy types: A wide variety of foes with different behaviors and attack patterns to keep you on your toes.

▸    Epic boss fights: Face powerful adversaries at the end of each world in memorable, skill-testing encounters.

▸    Food & item collection: Gather food, toys, and power-ups to restore health and unlock new abilities as you progress.

▸    5+ skills to master: Unlock and use a range of skills and items that add depth and variety to your gameplay.

▸    Engaging soundtrack: Original music that perfectly complements every moment of the adventure.

▸    Prologue + 30 levels: A full prologue sets the stage, followed by 30 levels of pure platforming fun, with more content on the way.

🐱 Who is Willy?

Willy is a brave, tenacious little cat with a heart of gold. He starts his journey as an ordinary kitten, but as you progress through the levels, he grows stronger, unlocking new skills and power-ups along the way. Every animal companion you rescue has its own unique personality — together, they’ll help you on your quest to save the world.

🎯 Who is Cat Dimension for?

If you love classic platformers, adore cats, and enjoy a colorful adventure with just the right amount of challenge, Cat Dimension is the game for you. Perfect for quick sessions or extended playthroughs, it’s designed for anyone looking for genuine fun with a touch of retro nostalgia.

Superheroes and cats — two of the internet’s biggest obsessions — come together in Cat Dimension.

🚀 Early Access — Your feedback matters!

Cat Dimension is currently in Early Access, which means the game is still growing and evolving. New levels, items, and improvements are being developed based on player feedback. Join the community, share your experience, and help shape the future of the game!

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian
*languages with full audio support
